title: Better Left Click
description: Allows you to use left click bind like normal but not lose out on the competitive and survival advantage of using a keyboard key.
body:
### Disclaimer
- **NO, this is NOT an autoclicker. An autoclicker would mess up breaking blocks, hitting players just once like a normal hit would be hard, and just generally annoying to have to turn off and on.**
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

In Minecraft, binding left click to place break/hit sucks when compared to using a keyboard key. It feels much worse compared to just holding a keyboard keybind for it, and that's because keyboard keys repeat at a much faster rate. Yes keyboard players can just hold a key and get what can be classified as high cps in a way.

Player who use a keyboard bind for it will be able hold the hit button without spamming it and manage to keep mobs at a distance if they are low on health. In creative mode they get to break blocks waaay faster too. Also it can be useful in mace pvp if you want to lower your opponents shield's durability until it runs out and literally breaks (not disables).

### - My mod fixes that
You can break blocks at the same speed in creative mode. (no effect on survival)

You can hold to repeatedly click useful in survival to keep mobs at a distance or spam for whatever needed reason in pvp like an autohit.

This is a Qol overall.

Note: Make sure this mod is allowed on the servers you play on, although I don't think it will be flagged by anticheats (no promises!).
